mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_LIKE (LIKE_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID) VALUES (TRV_LIKE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{memberId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRV_LIKE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRV_LIKE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRV_LIKE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
